history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The cell immediately ahead (D06) is a safe floor tile. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without encountering lava or walls. The path to the goal appears to be north to D05, then east to E05 and F05. There is lava at E06 and F06, so I should avoid moving east too early.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The cell directly ahead (D06) is a safe floor tile. The lava cells are at E07 and F07, so moving east from the current position is dangerous. The goal is at F06, which is two steps east and one step north of the current position. To reach it safely, I should first move forward to D06, then turn right and move east twice. Therefore, the immediate next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The cell directly ahead (D06) is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The goal is visible at F07, two cells to the east. There is a safe floor cell at E07. No lava is visible. I will turn right to face east, then move forward twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The cell directly ahead (D06) is a safe floor tile. The goal is at D05, two steps ahead. There are no lava cells in the direct path; lava is to the east (E06, E05). Moving forward is safe and leads toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north. The cell directly ahead (D06) contains the goal G. No obstacle or lava in front. Moving forward reaches the goal immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
